items.title: California of Europe: Vineyards, Resorts, 100 Miles of Coastline
items.summary: Portugal features scenic rolling vineyards, luxury resorts, and extensive coastline attracting international travelers.

items.title: 14 Must-Try Portuguese Dishes: Egg Tarts to Iberian Pork
items.summary: Guide to fourteen authentic Portuguese dishes including Lisbon egg tarts and Évora Iberian pork.

items.title: 16 Best Portuguese Beaches for Sun and Scenic Views
items.summary: Guide highlighting Portugal's best beaches offering scenic coastlines and sun-drenched sandy shores.

items.title: Portugal Deploys 340 Police Officers at Airports to Reduce Queues
items.summary: Portugal increases airport police presence to cut waiting times and improve traveler experience.
